title: Law establishing the UAE Data Office
official_title: Federal Decree-Law No. 44 of 2021 on the Establishment of the UAE Data Office
official_title_ar: مرسوم بقانون اتحادي رقم (44) لسنة 2021 في شأن إنشاء مكتب الإمارات للبيانات

gazette.name: Official Gazette of the United Arab Emirates

citation: Federal Decree-Law No. 44 of 2021 on the Establishment of the UAE Data Office
summary: Establishes the UAE Data Office attached to the Cabinet as the federal data protection regulator. The Office is mandated to enforce the Personal Data Protection Law, propose data policies and legislation, approve transfer destinations, and handle complaints.
impact_note: This law matters because the entire federal data protection regime routes through the body it creates. Until the Data Office is fully operational and the executive regulations issue, enforcement of the UAE PDPL remains dormant, which is the single most important fact for onshore compliance planning. Track the Office's activation, leadership appointments, and first guidance, since those events will start the practical compliance clock.

entity_types: controllers and processors under the PDPL

notes: Confirm the gazette issue number and operational status of the Office during research build out.
